actionUnits.condition: Manually invoke SpawnObject.Spawn to instantiate the Box prefab because XRButton.OnPress UnityEvent does not reference Spawn(). MonoBehaviour_0 (fileID 131723510, guid a658f19182a575a46b14f720a8e295a7) on 'Spawn Button' config: originalObject -> Box (fileID 6150933721197494150, guid 97e89670ed7696d489d6ddba4543a01b); spawnPosition -> Transform (fileID 7863669398301968895).

Ensure audio callback configured via OnCollision.OnEnter UnityEvent is covered even if no physical collision occurs in test. Box has Rigidbody and BoxCollider (BoxCollider id 3174054499936259574). Scene meta maps OnEnter.m_Calls -> PlayQuickSound.Play on MonoBehaviour_2 (fileID 2085702217920827848, guid 0755a2ba17a31d643b4a27e3034d8a79).

Manually invoke SpawnObject.Spawn on 'Move Down Button' because its XRButton.OnPress UnityEvent (MonoBehaviour_1 id 3016069961546575966, guid acde65f5db6773e49ad668404cf55472) triggers parameterized calls TranslateObject.TranslateY(-0.1) and PlaySoundsFromList.PlayAtIndex(1), which cannot be directly invoked by a Trigger action. MonoBehaviour_0 (id 1086352045, guid a658f19182a575a46b14f720a8e295a7) is SpawnObject with originalObject set to Box (fileID 6150933721197494150, guid 97e89670ed7696d489d6ddba4543a01b) and spawnPosition set to this GameObject's Transform (fileID 7863669397899538605).

Manually invoke SpawnObject.Spawn on 'Move Up Button' because its XRButton.OnPress UnityEvent (MonoBehaviour_1 id 3016069959630375334, guid acde65f5db6773e49ad668404cf55472) triggers parameterized calls TranslateObject.TranslateY(0.1) and PlaySoundsFromList.PlayAtIndex(0), which cannot be directly invoked by a Trigger action. MonoBehaviour_0 (id 839586645, guid a658f19182a575a46b14f720a8e295a7) is SpawnObject with originalObject set to Box (fileID 6150933721197494150, guid 97e89670ed7696d489d6ddba4543a01b) and spawnPosition set to this GameObject's Transform (fileID 7863669396577847637).

Scene mapping: Controls (fileID 1718703366) has TranslateObject attached (MonoBehaviour_0 id 1718703368, guid 866d134ae31a01841b6156f8d0a87054). Reset Button (fileID 7863669397134400380) has XRButton (MonoBehaviour_1 id 3016069960143379342, guid acde65f5db6773e49ad668404cf55472) and RemoveObjectsWithTag (MonoBehaviour_0 id 1824525328, guid 67ddb01715fbbc34fb1b56a1a852d398). XRButton.OnPress in scene meta has m_Calls to TranslateObject.ResetToStartingPosition on multiple components (fileIDs: 74831552, 203819839, 531403574, 898355187, 1147109801, 1248989243, 1124768097, 988422739). Because XR press relies on collider/hover interactions not fully specified, we manually invoke the parameterless TranslateObject.ResetToStartingPosition methods to cover these UnityEvent calls.

XRLever (MonoBehaviour_0 id 5754956525560203020, guid e601cf28e9702c945abe3b90e7f51974) has defaultValue = true, so Start() calls SetValue(true) which invokes OnLeverActivate automatically. If this auto path does not execute at runtime, manually invoke the listener referenced by OnLeverActivate to ensure coverage. OnLeverDeactivate requires XR Select/Release interaction and pose evaluation; additional collider/handle details are needed to simulate it.

MonoBehaviour_0 (id 774548518, guid 65a8500fa86faa04596fb5f9d40efeae) on GameObject 'Knob' is XRKnob, matching the provided script. Scene meta shows XRKnob's XRBaseInteractable events wired: m_SelectEntered calls PlayContinuousSound.Play (script fileID 4079354613688537254), and m_SelectExited calls PlayContinuousSound.Pause (same script). OnValueChange has no persistent listeners. Since select/hover requires XR runtime interaction and no colliders are listed, manually invoke the parameterless listeners to ensure coverage of these UnityEvent bindings.
